r 1'r 1'

[lu₂]⸢mu⸣-kin₇ md60—AD—URI₃ DUMU ša₂ mman-nu—⸢i⸣-qa-⸢pu⸣ [A ...]

Witnesses: Anu-ab-uṣur, son of Mannu-iqapu, [descendant of PN];

r 2'2'

[m]ina—qi₂-bit—d60 DUMU ša₂ md60—DINiṭ A m⸢E₂⸣.KUR—za-kir md[...]

Ina-qibit-Anu, son of Anu-uballiṭ, descendant of Ekur-zakir; [PN, son of PN],

r 3'3'

A mḫun-zu-u₂ md60—BAša₂-an-ni DUMU ša₂ mina—qi₂-⸢bit⸣—d60 [A ...]

descendant of Hunzu; Iqišanni, son of Ina-qibit-Anu, [descendant of PN];

r 4'4'

md<60>—DINsu DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a—MU A md30—TI—⸢ER₂⸣ [m... DUMU ša₂]

Anu-uballissu, son of Nanaya-iddin, descendant of Sin-leqi-unninni; [PN, son of]

r 5'5'

mni-din-tu₄—d60 ⸢A⸣ mḫun-zu-u₂ mki-din u mni-din-tu₄—⸢d⸣[60 DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ m...]

Nidintu-Anu, descendant of Hunzu; Kidin-Anu and Nidintu-Anu, [sons of PN],

r 6'6'

⸢A⸣ mE₂.KUR—za-kir mdum-qi₂—d60 DUMU ša₂ mGAL—d60 x x (x) [...]

descendants of Ekur-zakir; Dumqi-Anu, son of Rabi-Anu ... [...]

[...] x (x) [... m]⸢d60—MU—GIŠ DUMU ša₂ md60—MU?⸣—[...]
